diagrams.title: Function Call Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how function calls work in C++ from declaration to execution and return
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how functions execute and manage memory

diagrams.title: Type Casting Hierarchy in C++
diagrams.description: Visual representation of different casting operators and their use cases
elements: Explicit Casting: static_cast, dynamic_cast, const_cast, reinterpret_cast
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when and how to use each cast type

diagrams.title: Pass by Value vs Pass by Reference
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how data flows differently in both methods
elements: Function Parameter (copy in pass-by-value, reference in pass-by-value)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the difference in memory and data modification
